description:
The SmoothValue component smoothly interpolates a given value towards a target value at a set speed.
To do this it drives the value it is interpolating.

fields.TargetValue: The value that is being interpolated towards
fields.Speed: The speed at which it is interpolated
fields.WriteBack: If WriteBack is enabled, writing to the driven value will also set TargetValue. If not, the driven value cannot be written to. See write backs.
fields.Value: The value that is being driven
